Interface Item

All Known Implementing Classes:
AdrenalSyringe, DataFragment, DeepestVoid, Doomsday, EngineOverload, FinalWeapon, HexEditor, MagneticRepulsor, MagnetRing, MutatedBrain, NecroticHeart, NeuroAmplifier, ParasiticGas, PhantomDrive, ServoMotor, SoulHarvester, Steak, TitaniumArmor, TungstenPlating
public interface Item
The base interface or class for all items that can be collected or equipped.
